The '''Senate Guard Academy''' was the training center for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]]. When the Senate Guard expanded from a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] detail to becoming a full [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]], many recruits were drawn to the Senate Guard Academy from the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Coruscant Police training academies|police academies]]. This caused friction between the Guard and the CSF which was further compounded when the Senate Guard took charge of policing the [[Senate District/Legends|Legislative District]]. The power struggle between the CSF and the Senate Guard would last till the end of the Republic.
